Scoring: "Q1, Q2, Q4, Q8 - No = 1 / Yes = 0 Q3, Q5, Q6 - No = 0 / Yes = 1 Q7 - ""Review once per semester/every 1-6 months"" = 1 / ""Review once every 7-11 months"" = 0.75 / ""Review once a year"" = 0.5 / ""Review once every 1 year or more"" = 0.25 / ""Never reviewed/No fixed review schedule/Only review when vision is unclear"" = 0 Full marks is 8,. The higher the score, the better the compliance"
